title: Vibrant Dutch Tofu Bowl
description: A garlicky, tender, adventurous Dutch-inspired vegan bowl featuring sun-dried tomatoes and pickled cucumber, served in a hot dolsot stone bowl.
instructions: Press the tofu to remove excess moisture and cut into 1-inch cubes.
In a bowl combine tofu, minced garlic, soy sauce, tahini, lemon juice, and sesame oil; marinate for 15 minutes.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and add the marinated tofu, cooking until golden on all sides, about 8 minutes.
While tofu cooks, sauté sun-dried tomatoes in a dry pan for 2 minutes to soften.
Add spinach to the skillet and sauté until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Transfer the cooked mixture into a preheated dolsot stone bowl.
Arrange pickled cucumber ribbons on top of the tofu mixture.
Sprinkle chopped scallions, salt, and pepper over the bowl.
Place the dolsot on a heat source for 2 minutes to create gentle steam and meld flavors.
Serve hot straight from the stone bowl with an optional drizzle of sesame oil.
